name: First strike
description: When this character enters within melee range of an enemy (including when placed or when a door opens), it gets an immediate free melee attack action.

name: Parry
description: When the user of this item is the target of a melee attack, you may roll a combat die. Each hit scored negates 1 hit from the enemy's attack as if it were physical armour.

name: Rough ground
description: This area use rough ground rules with the value shown. If it has a negative value it reduces the effect of any area of rough ground you are in.

name: X dice
description: The attack may roll an additional number of dice equal to the number of pegs spent.

name: Fly
description: This character gains scramble, ignores the first hit of any attack of opportunity, and cannot be knocked prone (but other parts of a rule can still make them prone).

name: Ammunition
description: A character firing this weapon must have a gear or armour token of the matching type to fire it. Throwing stars are a weapon in themselves and do not require a separate gear token; the token itself is discarded if they run out.

name: Hawkeye
description: This attack ignores partial cover and can fire at engaged characters at any range without randomisation.

name: Hazardous
description: When used, roll the blue die. On a hit, the item's normal effects are applied. On a [symbol], the user suffers the effects shown instead. On a blank, no effects are applied.

name: Balanced
description: This weapon rolls +1 dice when thrown.

name: Scramble
description: The top number is the maximum height or width in squares/inches of objects/characters that the character can move up or over as part of a normal move action (they do not need to climb or spend actions). The bottom number is the character's safe distance for jumping down or across.

name: Piercing
description: Physical armour cannot negate hits from this weapon.

name: Plunderer
description: If this attack causes damage, a random item from the defending character's inventory is scattered. If the attack also scored a critical hit the attacker may take the item instead.

name: Sharp
description: If this weapon rolls a critical hit the target is wounded, even if no damage was caused.

name: Bludgeoning
description: If this attack rolls a critical hit, the target is fatigued, even if no damage was caused. The target suffers 1 additional fatigued counter for each damage caused. This attack rolls 1 extra die when attacking terrain pieces.

name: Hidden location
description: Draw the hidden location card with the matching number and return the token to its supply (pouch for common tokens, separate bag otherwise).

name: Book
description: In the next market phase after obtaining this item, roll the magic die. (1-2: Worthless; 3-5: Sold for equal to roll; 6-7: Adventurer gains 1 XP; 8: Add 1 random relic resource to pouch).

name: Hit and run
description: After making a melee attack, if this character is still engaged it makes a free move directly away from the defender, ignoring attacks of opportunity, if there is space. It will not engage other enemies with this move.

name: Poison
description: If this weapon rolls a critical hit, the target is poisoned, even if no damage was caused.

name: Shield block
description: This character may spend an action to raise their shield to gain the effects shown. Return it to the inventory if the user takes any action other than move/dash, suffers damage, or becomes stunned. Can be raised out of turn before dice are rolled, making the character fatigued.

name: Preparation
description: After this weapon is used, turn the token 180° and it cannot be used. It requires an action to ready the weapon for use again.

name: Purification
description: When used, the character may replace their X rightmost black HEALTH pegs with green ones.

name: Immobile
description: This character cannot move or be moved unless a rule explicitly states otherwise.

name: Immunity
description: This icon is seen alongside other abilities and statuses. This character does not suffer any counters or effects from the ability shown.

name: Burning
description: If this attack rolls a critical hit, the target is Burning, even if no damage was caused. Equipment with this icon is considered a source of fire.

name: Camouflage
description: This character can only be targeted by ranged attacks from within short range.

name: Indestructible
description: This item ignores any rule that would cause it to break. If you need to determine a random item to be broken, choose another if possible.

name: Quickstrike
description: If this weapon rolls a critical hit during a melee attack, you may dash or make another attack for free after the initial attack is resolved.

name: Size
description: This character is smaller or larger than an average human and additional rules apply.

name: Skill
description: The skill shown can be used by the character at up to the level shown, exactly as if it was on the character's class board.

name: Rank
description: The power level of an NPC. NPCs activate in order of rank, starting with the highest.

name: Reach
description: May make a melee attack against an enemy up to X squares away, including diagonally. Unless in contact, characters are not considered engaged. Verticality applies on multi-level terrain.

name: Stash
description: This item may be instantly discarded when found to add its value to your stash (it doesn't need to go into the inventory).

name: Infinite ammo
description: When this token is used for a ranged attack, it ignores rules that would cause you to run out of ammunition.

name: Terrifying
description: If this character rolls a critical hit when attacking, the target is terrified. If an enemy ends their turn within short range, roll the magic die; on a 1 they become terrified.

name: Channel
description: Seen alongside other stats or abilities. At least 1 magic peg must be spent to use/activate. X values can be improved by spending more pegs.

name: Key
description: A character carrying this item may lock or unlock any door or terrain piece as an effortless action.

name: Forbidden channel
description: As Channel, but the forbidden magic die must be rolled instead of the regular magic die.

name: Cleave
description: If this melee attack defeats an enemy, you may resolve the same attack against another eligible enemy, removing 1 hit. This continues until you fail to defeat an enemy or none remain.

name: Lasting effect
description: Lasts until the end of the round (rotate 180°). You may spend X magic pegs to add reminder counters to remove one each assessment phase instead of discarding/rotating.

name: Trap
description: Can be set in an adjacent square with an interact action. Triggered by entering its square or adjacent square. Flip facedown after use; check for breakage on a [symbol] roll.

name: Reactive
description: Once per turn, if another character starts their turn or enters range of this character's attacks, this character immediately makes a free attack against them, interrupting movement.

name: Crafting-Resource
description: Item used as an ingredient for crafting. Letter and colour determine resource type. Numbered items craft unique relics.

name: Location specific
description: Unless stated otherwise, this item only works in the quest in which it was found, or the next quest if purchased in a market phase.

name: Regeneration (peg type)
description: In the assessment phase, restore X pegs of the type shown. Cumulative from multiple sources.

name: Unarmed combat
description: Found on character board; allows melee attacks even without a weapon.

name: Creature
description: Unless stated otherwise, this character cannot open doors, search, use equipment or interact with terrain.

name: Cumbersome
description: If attack rolls [symbol] and is not broken, rotate 180° (requires effortless action to ready). Cannot be thrown.

name: Loud
description: Increase the dread by 1 when this item is used.

name: Relentless
description: A character attacked multiple times in 1 round by relentless characters has their physical armour reduced by 1 for each attack after the first (min 0).

name: Lull
description: Reduce dread by the number when this item is used.

name: Unreliable
description: If an attack rolls a single [symbol] it has jammed (rotate 180°). If it rolls 2 or more, it has broken.

name: Magical armour
description: Spend an action and up to X magic pegs to increase warded value by X. Rotate 180° to mark active.

name: Curse
description: If this weapon rolls a critical hit, the target is cursed, even if no damage was caused.

name: Malacyte enhancement
description: This character may cast spells with 1 more magic peg than their rank allows.

name: Re-roll
description: On weapon: re-roll 1 combat die per use. On character/token: re-roll 1 die of any type used for any action on their behalf.

name: Unsanctioned
description: This character follows the rules for unsanctioned Maladaar.

name: Darkness
description: Treat item as the appropriate counter. Affects area in short range and moves with the character.

name: Light
description: Treat item as the appropriate counter. Affects area in short range and moves with the character.

name: Malacyte stability
description: You may discard a magic peg to re-roll the magic die.

name: Vampiric (peg type)
description: On critical hit, target loses a peg of shown type (or type they have most of) and attacker restores a peg of same type or becomes blessed.

name: Rest
description: Only used during a rest action. Discard token to apply shown abilities.

name: Defensive re-roll
description: Force 1 die to be re-rolled from an attack against them (unless it ignores physical armour). Critical hits cannot be re-rolled.

name: Restore Skill
description: When used, restores X skill pegs to user or contact.

name: Restore Health
description: When used, restores X pegs or grants X additional actions to user or contact.

name: Restore Magic
description: When used, restores X magic pegs to user or contact.

name: Restore Action
description: When used, restores X actions to user or contact. Actions must be used in the character's turn in the current round

name: Malacytic conduit
description: At the start of each turn, add a blue peg to the dread tracker. Applies while carried/worn if on an item.

name: Master
description: Found on companions/summons. Linked ability applies to controlling character while within short range.

name: Discard
description: When used, return this item to the supply.

name: Effortless
description: This item can be used as an effortless action.

name: Vicious
description: Results on the blue die on attacks made with this weapon are critical hits.

name: Retaliation
description: If blocking at least 1 hit from a melee attack that rolls [symbol], resolve an attack against the attacker with one die for each [symbol] rolled.

name: Night sight
description: This character ignores all effects of darkness.

name: Volatile
description: If attack rolls [symbol] on blue die, user takes 1 damage and adjacent characters are attacked with burning rule.

name: Entangling
description: If attack hits, target is fatigued. On critical hit, target is knocked prone. Effects apply even if no damage caused.

name: Otherworldly
description: Originates from another dimension. No effect on its own but interacts with other rules.

name: Fast
description: This character can move X additional squares when making a move action.

name: Pack
description: Characters arrive in groups. Place the number shown instead of a single character; they activate individually.

name: Worthy opponent
description: If an adventurer defeats this character, their party gains 1 RENOWN. Appears only once per quest.

name: Rope
description: Action to place in contact. Allows characters to climb (1 action per level) or jump across gaps (adding 2 to safe distance).
